appearance.accentHint: Used for highlights across the app, like the command palette and quick-add menu.
appearance.modeHint: Choose how the interface looks. System follows your OS setting.

sections.avatarHint: Choose the avatar shown on your profile and in game stats.
sections.accountHint: These fields are managed by your account and are read-only.

avatarDrawer.title: Choose your avatar
avatarDrawer.description: Select the avatar shown on your profile and in game stats.

validation.linkedinInvalid: Please enter a valid LinkedIn URL (e.g., https://www.linkedin.com/in/username).
validation.fixLinkedInBeforeSave: Please fix the LinkedIn URL before saving.

toasts.saveError: Failed to update profile. Please try again.

emailChange.title: Institution email
emailChange.hint: Send a confirmation link to change the login email for this institution account.
emailChange.sameAsCurrentError: The new email must be different from the current email.
emailChange.successBody: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. It expires in 10 minutes.
emailChange.securityNote: The raw token is never stored. This request is only valid for active institution admins and is audited on both request and redemption.
emailChange.redeemSuccessBody: Your account has been updated. You are being signed out so you can log back in with the new email.
emailChange.redeemErrorTitle: Email change could not be confirmed
emailChange.redeemFailed: This confirmation link is invalid, expired, or already used.
